rules.directive: Capture+host real images/video/gradient from source; no flat fills or placeholder boxes where source has imagery.
rules.rationale: Auto-derived from grader defect (asset_capture, 2×): no canvas/video vs source has 1 canvas / 0 video

rules.directive: Reproduce detected source hover/scroll motion via joist-* classes; grader must verify it fires.
rules.rationale: Auto-derived from grader defect (motion_runtime, 2×): clone scroll-change 11% vs source 48%

rules.directive: Author every top-level source section; verify clone page-height is within ~15% of source before grading.
rules.rationale: Auto-derived from grader defect (section_completeness, 2×): full-page mismatch 47% (width-normalized) vs ≤45%

rules.directive: Match source computed type (size/weight/family/tracking) per element; do not default headings to bold or system fonts.
rules.rationale: Auto-derived from grader defect (typography_match, 3×): heading 56px vs 34px
